text.content:
2
*�����������������	from TDStoreTools import StorageManager
import json

class Imagesearch():

	def __init__(self, ownerComp):
		'''
		Basic extension class for enhancing TouchDesigner component networks
		with python functionality
		'''
		#The component to which this extension is attached
		self.ownerComp = ownerComp

		#The name for the dependency storage object is
		#this class name appended with 'Stored' ie. "ImageSearchStored"
		storedItems = [
			{'name':'Attribute1','default':1}, #With caps the name is promoted as a property 
			{'name':'Attribute2','default':1.0, 'readOnly':True}, #This property is also read only
			{'name':'attribute3','default':None}, #This value is stored but its not promoted
			{'name':'AttributesDd','default':{}, 'dependable':True}, #This property holds a special dependable dictionary
			{'name':'Attributes','default':{}}, #This property holds a regular dictionary so changes to items in this dictionary will not trigger TouchDesigner dependent objects
			{'name':'Postdata','default':{'cx':None,'key':None,'q':'Desert Landscape','searchType':'image','start':1,'num':10,'as_filetype':None,'imgsz':None,'imgtype':None,'imgc':None,'imgcolor':None,'as_rights':None},'dependable':True},
			{'name':'previous','default':None},
			{'name':'Currpage','default':0},
			]

		#The stored attribute allows for easy access to the stored dependency dictionary
		self.stored = StorageManager(self, ownerComp, storedItems)

	def Query(self):
		webDAT = parent.ImageSearch.op('search/web2')
		parent.ImageSearch.op('search/script1').par.Page = self.Currpage
		if parent.ImageSearch.op('search/info1')['communicating'] == 0:
			webDAT.par.fetch.pulse()
		return

	def parse(self, scriptOp=None):
		# if the returned text is different, try to parse
		text = scriptOp.inputs[0].text
		if text != self.previous:
			self.previous = text
			if self.Currpage == 0:
				scriptOp.clear()
				scriptOp.appendRow(['name','path'])
			try:
				parsedJson = json.loads(text)
				items = parsedJson.get('items',[])
				for pic in items:
					title = pic.get('title',None)
					path = pic.get('link',app.samplesFolder+'/Map/Banana.tif')
					scriptOp.appendRow([title,path])
				if self.Currpage <= 7:
					self.Currpage += 1
					self.Query()
			except:
				scriptOp.appendRow(['No Image',app.samplesFolder+'/Map/Banana.tif'])
		return 1
